# Accounting & Audit — Regulatory Constraints

| Regulation                        | Key Requirement                                      |
|-----------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------|
| IFRS (IAS/IFRS Suite)             | Basis for all financial statement preparation        |
| CRD IV / FINREP (EBA)             | Quarterly prudential statements in XBRL format       |
| Sarbanes-Oxley (SOX s.302/404)    | Internal controls over financial reporting           |
| Companies Act 2006 (UK)           | Statutory accounts; true and fair view requirement  |
| FRS 101 / 102                     | UK reduced IFRS disclosure regime for subsidiaries  |
| Statutory Audit Directive 2006/43 | Auditor independence and rotation requirements      |
| MiFID II Art. 16(6-7)             | 7-year retention for trade-related accounting records|
| Tax compliance (CIT / VAT)        | Transfer pricing documentation; VAT on fees         |
